---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A brief description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Use Case
What problem does this solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution
How do you envision this feature working?

## RTMS Capability
Does this feature leverage RTMS real-time capabilities? If so, how?

- [ ] Uses live transcript data
- [ ] Uses real-time analysis
- [ ] Uses meeting events (join/leave, etc.)
- [ ] Uses audio stream (if available)
- [ ] Not RTMS-related

## Industry Vertical
Is this feature specific to an industry vertical?

- [ ] General (all use cases)
- [ ] Healthcare
- [ ] Legal
- [ ] Sales
- [ ] Customer Support
- [ ] New vertical (please describe)

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Context
Any other information, mockups, or examples that would help explain this feature.
